gh_adccbfbc72a6a1772058e2da.title: [Remoto] Cloud Security Analyst (Sênior) na Coodesh
gh_adccbfbc72a6a1772058e2da.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/analista-de-seguranca-da-informacao-senior-seguranca-em-nuvem-125511322?utm_source=github&utm_medium=DevOps-Brazil-Vagas&modal=open) para realizar a candidatura. 👋 **Atividades:** * Projetar, implementar e gerenciar controles de segurança para ambientes em nuvem (AWS, Azure, GCP). * Realizar avaliações de segurança em infraestruturas e aplicações. * Monitorar e responder a eventos e incidentes de segurança em ambientes cloud. * Colaborar com as equipes de desenvolvimento, DevOps e infraestrutura para implementar práticas de segurança na nuvem. * Automatizar tarefas de segurança na nuvem. * Manter-se atualizado sobre as últimas ameaças e vulnerabilidades. * Apoiar na definição e implementação de políticas de segurança específicas para a nuvem. * Realizar testes de segurança e simulações de ataque em ambientes cloud. * Documentar procedimentos e configurações de segurança na nuvem. ## TruckPag:

Somos uma empresa de meios de pagamento especializada em gestão de frotas, com nosso cartão TruckPag, o cliente abastece com economia, facilidade e total controle. Com a CIOTPag, o cliente tem soluções completas para a sua gestão de frete a partir da emissão de CIOT e pagamento eletrônico de frete (PEF) . Além disso, a PagPedágio possibilita que as viagens sejam bem mais rápidas, sem precisar enfrentar filas de pedágios, em todo território nacional.

Somos 100% TruckPag: sem bancos, sem fundos, sem intermediadores e sem burocracia.

Veja mais no site ## Habilidades: - AWS - Azure - GCP ## Local: Remota ## Requisitos: - Ensino superior completo - Experiência comprovada em segurança de ambientes de nuvem (AWS, Azure, GCP). - Experiência com ferramentas de segurança específicas para nuvem (CSPM, CWPP, etc.). - Conhecimento em IaC (Infrastructure as Code) e segurança em pipelines de CI/CD. - Conhecimento em segurança de contêineres e orquestradores (Docker, Kubernetes). ## Diferenciais: - Conhecimento em IaC (Infrastructure as Code) e segurança em pipelines de CI/CD. ## Benefícios: - Horários Flexíveis - Descanso Remunerado - Incentivo aos estudos (Descontos em faculdades) ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Cloud Security Analyst (Sênior) na TruckPag](https://coodesh.com/jobs/analista-de-seguranca-da-informacao-senior-seguranca-em-nuvem-125511322?utm_source=github&utm_medium=DevOps-Brazil-Vagas&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Remoto #### Regime PJ #### Categoria Cyber Segurança

gh_ad660c38d1054c48f91e476c.title: [REMOTE] - Junior & Middle Level Full-stack Developer (React.js + Node.js) - Shaw and Partners
gh_ad660c38d1054c48f91e476c.description:
Hi full-stack devs! We are #hiring **Junior & Middle Full-Stack developers**
Join our team for fast growth😉


**Who we are and what we do**
Shaw and Partners is a software development provider for high-profile startups with approximately 25 remote staff. We are also incubating two startups. 
[Christopher Shaw](https://chrisshaw.me/), The Founder and CEO would be your manager.


**Responsibilities:**

- Design, build, and maintain efficient, reusable, and reliable code
- Ensure the best possible performance, quality, and responsiveness of the applications
- Identify and track bottlenecks and bugs, and devise solutions to these problems
- Help maintain code quality, organization, and internal standards


**Technical requirements:**

- Frustrated with poorly structured, inefficient, and unmaintainable code
- Experience with testing frameworks, building backend APIs and user-centric frontends
- Solid Computer Science fundamentals knowledge (algorithms, data structures, concurrency, etc.)


**Languages you need to know:**

- React.js, Node.js and TypeScript


**It would be very nice if you had:**

- Strong experience and interest in working with Kubernetes, Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud Platform
- Experience with Next, and Responsive Web Design, state management patterns and solutions (e.g. Redux) ES2015+, HTML5 APIs and CSS3
- Working experience in Continuous Integration/Deployment
- B.Sc. degree or equivalent in Computer Science or Software Engineering
 
**But before you apply, you need to know that:**

- You will have the opportunity to work very closely with our CEO, relax he doesn't bite 
- We pay you in USD
- We don't ask you to keep advanced English in your pocket, we have employees from Jordan, Egypt, Argentina, Brazil, the United States, Ukraine and more.
- We don't have happy hours on Fridays because everyone works remotely, but there are online games if you arrange them with the team.
- Do you have a doctor's appointment or a driving test in the middle of the week? No problem, you manage your own hours, you just have to keep an eye on when the client sends a message and requests a meeting.
- It sounds a bit obvious, but for those who have never worked remotely, we don't require a dress code. You just can't show up without a shirt when you're on a video call, okay?
- If you refer a colleague to work with us and they are hired, after three months of your friend's employment contract, we'll pay you an allowance.
We're not Google, but our selection process is faster than theirs, you can trust us


**We'll have a crush on you if:**

- You have a sense of ownership, the project is yours, there was a bug at the weekend? Fix it
- You enjoy working on a project from start to finish, so roll up your sleeves because you'll be working on both the front-end and the back-end too.
- But don't worry if you're not so keen on working on either, tell us and we'll find a way!
- You like working as part of a team, “nobody's hand is in anyone else's”
- You're plugged into the latest news in the tech world and like to give input on new ideas and solutions
- Is always attentive to customer feedback, after all it's the customer who pays the bills


**Maybe Shaw a isn't the right company for you if:**

- You're lazy LOL
- You need micromanagement. Of course, we know that a junior professional will need a little more attention at first, but once you “learn to ride a bike”, you never forget, right
- You want to work in a 100% secure company and are looking for total stability. We are an advanced growth startup

**B2B contract - PJ**

**So, do you think you could be a match?**
Then go here and apply: https://shawandpartners.com/opt/?jobId=11
